overall.description: Gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic action game showing two characters riding a horse through an abandoned urban environment overgrown with lush vegetation. The journey progresses from narrow alleys between ivy-covered buildings through open plazas and finally into a shallow stream with a waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow overgrown alley between abandoned ivy-covered buildings

agents.ego_description: riding horse steadily through narrow passage with companion seated behind

entered.detail: tall abandoned building facade completely covered in green ivy and vegetation
tall abandoned building facade completely covered in green ivy and vegetation
large tree branches extending over the path creating partial canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow overgrown alley between two abandoned buildings completely covered in ivy. The horse walks steadily forward on grass and dirt, with tree branches overhead creating a tunnel-like effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban intersection with street signage

events.description: exits narrow alley into open intersection area with visible street sign

agents.ego_description: navigating horse through open plaza toward distant buildings, passing street sign on right

entered.detail: tall metal pole with green street signs at top
cylindrical structure with map or poster display
multi-story glass and concrete office buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: The horse emerges from the narrow alley into a wide open plaza. A street sign post and information kiosk appear on the right, while distant modern buildings become visible ahead. The ground transitions from grass to overgrown paved tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching waterfall and stream

events.description: waterfall becomes visible in the distance beyond the plaza

agents.ego_description: riding horse across open grassy area toward waterfall and water feature in the distance

entered.detail: water cascading down concrete structure visible in the distance
elevated highway or bridge structure with concrete supports
rusted vehicle parked near the water edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide grassy plaza with a waterfall becoming visible in the distance. The camera approaches a concrete overpass structure on the left and an abandoned pickup truck near the water's edge. The distant buildings shift to the left as the horse moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stream bank with abandoned truck under concrete overpass

events.description: horse slows and approaches the water edge before entering

agents.ego_description: guiding horse along stream bank toward water entry point, passing abandoned truck

entered.detail: shallow water channel with concrete banks becoming visible
large support columns for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The horse rides along the bank of a stream under a concrete overpass. The abandoned truck moves into close view on the right, while the stream water becomes prominent ahead. Large concrete pillars of the overpass dominate the left side as the horse approaches the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow concrete stream channel with flowing water

events.description: horse steps into the water and begins wading through the stream

agents.ego_description: riding horse through shallow water along the concrete stream channel

entered.detail: waterfall now visible up close on the left side of the stream
vertical concrete walls lining the stream channel

segments.scene_description: The horse enters the shallow stream and begins wading through the water. The waterfall is now visible up close on the left, with concrete channel walls lining the stream. The abandoned truck and grassy banks recede behind as the horse continues through the water channel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, ivy-choked alleyway into a sprawling, overgrown urban plaza. It begins with the horse walking steadily through a narrow corridor of abandoned buildings, where dense ivy and overhanging tree branches create a tunnel-like effect. As the horse emerges from the greenery, the space opens into a wide plaza where the grassy ground transitions to overgrown paved tiles and street signage appears. The scene then expands further across the grassy expanse, shifting the distant modern buildings to the left as the camera approaches a concrete overpass and an abandoned pickup truck. Finally, the view opens completely to reveal a waterfall cascading in the distance near the water's edge.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete underpass into the refreshing flow of a shallow urban stream. It begins with the horse riding along a grassy bank beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing an abandoned truck that looms close on the right. As the horse approaches the water's edge, the dominant pillars of the overpass give way to the open stream ahead. The scene then shifts as the horse enters the water, wading through a concrete channel while the abandoned truck and banks recede into the distance. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the stream, bringing a nearby waterfall on the left into clear view.
